title: Barron Trump photographed at World Cup in rare public appearance
shortDescription: Donald and Melania's only son Barron Trump attended the World Cup, but managed to avoid the cameras, almost. See the picture of him with Infantino.

title: Trump says Iran strikes to honor fallen soldiers
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said strikes on Iran were “in honor” of American soldiers killed in the Middle East over the weekend.

title: Trump shares photo of JD and Usha Vance's new baby. See sweet moment
shortDescription: President Trump shared a photo of JD and Usha Vance's new baby on Truth Social. Here's a look at the sweet moment.

title: Trump says US hit Iran 'very hard' after 3rd service member killed
shortDescription: Gulf countries reported fresh attacks from Iran after the U.S. launched a ninth consecutive night of strikes on the Middle Eastern country.

title: The 3 key Arizona congressional primaries to watch
shortDescription: These crucial congressional primary races in Arizona could provide clues about whether Republicans maintain their slim majority in the U.S. House.

title: Trump's Messi comments revive sports curse theory
shortDescription: Donald Trump's comments about Lionel Messi before Argentina's loss revived speculation about the president cursing teams. Here are some examples.

title: Donald Trump booed at World Cup final trophy ceremony
shortDescription: President Donald Trump was booed during the trophy presentation ceremony following the 2026 World Cup final between Spain and Argentina.

title: Who is sitting with Trump at World Cup final?
shortDescription: For the first time at the 2026 World Cup, U.S. President Donald Trump is in the house.

title: Can Lindsey Graham's Trump-endorsed sister fend off fellow GOP reps?
shortDescription: Lindsey Graham's little sister, Sen. Darline Graham, may seek a full term representing South Carolina with Trump's endorsement. Can she win?

title: Josh Hawley criticizes McConnell over absence from Senate
shortDescription: Sen. Josh Hawley, R-Missouri, is criticizing former Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell over his "obligation" to America.

title: New poll: Congress still up for grabs despite Trump's unpopularity
shortDescription: A new Washington Post poll shows a tight race for control of Congress as the November midterms near, and Donald Trump faces all-time low disapproval ratings.

title: What Trump family members will attend the FIFA World Cup Final?
shortDescription: Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump are scheduled to attend the World Cup final in New Jersey on July 19. Here's what to know about the family.

title: Trump ally seeks makeover ahead of critical Arizona governor's race
shortDescription: Gov. Katie Hobbs is considered the most vulnerable Democratic incumbent in a swing state that's been on the 2020 election denier frontlines for years.

title: Ontario premier bashes Trump's wildfire response
shortDescription: Ontario Premier Doug Ford criticized President Trump and the U.S. over their lack of assistance in fighting the wildfires sweeping through Canada.

title: Sam Neill dies, Trump IRS deal voided, Graham sworn in: Week in review
shortDescription: Recapping some of the most talked-about news this week from the nation and around the world – in case you missed it.

title: Trump's effort to get state voter info hits a brick wall in courts
shortDescription: Fifteen federal judges unanimously rejected Justice Department demands for state voter lists in a nationwide battle over election integrity.

title: Trump, family look forward to attending FIFA championship
shortDescription: Trump described at a FIFA World Cup reception how his family likes soccer and looks forward to attending the championship game July 19.

title: 'Unacceptable!' Trump threatens Canada with tariffs over wildfire smoke
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is threatening to charge tariffs to Canada over record levels of hazardous air drifting into the U.S. from hundreds of wildfires burning in the north.

title: Trump says he 'brought' World Cup, Olympics
shortDescription: President Donald Trump claimed that the reason why the United States hosted the World Cup and the Olympics is because he "brought them here."

title: Trump says China seized 220 million voter files. What the documents say
shortDescription: The president said China 'fought like hell not to have a Donald Trump win.' A USA TODAY review of declassified records tells a different story.

title: Feds threaten state election officials with funding cuts, prosecution
shortDescription: Experts are questioning Trump's claim that 250,000 noncitizens are registered to vote, citing flawed methodology.

title: Trump asks Lindsey Graham's sister to run for GOP Senate seat in SC
shortDescription: South Carolina Gov. Henry McMaster appointed Darline Graham as the first woman to represent South Carolina in the U.S. Senate on July 13.

title: Amy Schumer trolls viral Chuck Schumer Senate floor fart controversy
shortDescription: Amy Schumer tried to absolve her second cousin once removed, Sen. Chuck Schumer, who was accused of passing gas on the Senate floor earlier this week.
